title: Tobar Unicorn Projector Torch Toy - 24 Unicorn Images Assorted Designs and Colours, Pink
features: Colourful torch that projects colour pictures of unicorns against any surface.
Slide one of the three discs included into the torch, and then shine it against a wall to see a fantastic image projected onto the surface.
Roll the disc to one side to switch to a new image. Each disc contains eight colour pictures, for a total of 24 images supplied with every torch.
All Tobar / HGL toys are kid-tested for fun, engagement, entertainment and play value. All are made with the highest quality materials and workmanship for long lasting value
Non-toxic and child-safe, meets and exceeds all UK, EU and US testing standards, a perfect gift for kids ages 5 +
description: Product Description A colourful torch that projects colourful unicorn images against any surface. Slide one of the three discs supplied into the lamp, and turn on the torch to project a wonderful image against the wall. Roll the disc to the side to move to the next image. Each disc contains 8 images, total 24 photos per lamp. Directions Insert one of the three supplied discs into the lamp, light the torch to project an image onto a surface, then roll the disc to the side to move to the next image.
